---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for loractl
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: laurigates
---

## What

The capability you'd like, in a sentence.

## Why

The problem it solves or the use case it enables.

## How (sketch)

Any thoughts on the approach — which crate (`core` / `cli` / `api`), whether it
touches the trainer, the config schema, or the event stream. Keep the
load-bearing invariant in mind: `loractl-core` emits events and never renders.

## Roadmap fit

Does this relate to an existing milestone (#1–#4, #17–#25) or ADR
([`docs/adrs/`](../../docs/adrs/))? Link it if so.
